meaning: n.陆军中尉,海军上尉,副职官员
examples: The lieutenant stopped and stood stock-still.
I was a naval officer, lieutenant junior grade.
He was a second lieutenant in the army until he deserted.
Lieutenant Colonel Greg Butts(ph), a battalion commander for the 101st Airborne Division, gives a driving tour.
You can see why this impolitic ex-lieutenant governor did not last long as a politician.
